rules.rule_text:
rule kbot : banker
{
	meta:
		author = "mak"
		module = "kbot"
		reference = "https://www.cert.pl/en/news/single/newest-addition-a-happy-family-kbot/"

	strings:
		$bot_cfg = "BASECONFIG......FJ"
		$injini = "INJECTS.INI"
		$kbotini = "KBOT.INI"
		$bot0 = "BotConfig"
		$bot1 = "BotCommunity"
		$push_version = { 5? 68 [4] 68 [4] 5? E8 [4] 83 C4 10 85 C0 0F}

	condition:
		all of them
}
